head: claude/session-review-artifacts
title: docs(reviews): perf+health review artifacts + ADX regime-swap research
body:
## /performance-review + /health-review artifacts + regime-swap research

Tier-1 review/research artifacts (no live-path changes). Opened via the **pr-opener** runner-side path (dogfooding the MCP-independent PR creation).

- **health-review-backlog.json** — `BL-20260618-RECONCILE-DUP` (reconciler double-adoption: 19x MGC -$23.7K + MHG, episodic, confirmed live) + `BL-20260618-STALEHEARTBEAT`.
- **strategy-refinement-queue.json** — the ADX regime-swap results: a flat `adx_min=20` graduated nothing, but a **per-cell ADX threshold sweep found 4 live_ready candidates** (pullback ETH@25 +63R / ADA@30 +61R / SOL@15 +44R, trend XRP@15 +40R) — pending an out-of-pool holdout before any Tier-3 real-money proposal (overfit guard).
- **pending-pings.jsonl** — queued Claude-channel review pings.

The reconciler *code fix* is the separate Tier-2 PR #3949.

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)
